name: cloud-vpn
title: GCP Hybrid Connectivity — HA Cloud VPN
summary: Creates an HA VPN gateway (two interfaces), a Cloud Router, external peer gateways (one- or two-interface), and IPsec tunnels each with a BGP session (router interface + peer).

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory labels.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' label where supported (lowercased).

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' label where supported (lowercased).

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional labels merged beneath the mandatory label set (lowercased).

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: project_id
module.description: GCP project ID hosting the VPN gateway.

module.name: region
module.description: Region of the HA VPN gateway and Cloud Router.

module.name: network_self_link
module.description: Self-link of the VPC network. Supplied as a plain value — no framework dependency is implied.

module.name: router_asn
module.description: Google-side BGP ASN for the Cloud Router (private range; must differ from peer ASNs).

module.name: peer_gateways
module.description: External (on-premises) peer VPN gateways keyed by logical name. Two interfaces enable the 99.99% HA topology.

module.name: tunnels
module.type: map(object({ peer_gateway_key = string peer_external_gateway_interface = number vpn_gateway_interface = number shared_secret = string ike_version = optional(number, 2) bgp_session_range = string peer_bgp_ip = string peer_asn = number advertised_route_priority = optional(number, 100) }))
module.description: HA VPN tunnels keyed by logical name, each with its BGP session. For 99.99% SLA create 2 or 4 tunnels across both gateway interfaces.

outputs.name: gateway_id
outputs.description: ID of the HA VPN gateway.

outputs.name: gateway_interface_ips
outputs.description: Map of interface index (0/1) to the Google-side public IP. Hand these to the on-premises device configuration.

outputs.name: router_id
outputs.description: ID of the Cloud Router carrying the BGP sessions.

outputs.name: connection_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical tunnel name to VPN tunnel ID.

outputs.name: tunnel_self_links
outputs.description: Map of logical tunnel name to tunnel self-link (consumable as NCC hybrid-spoke URIs).

outputs.name: bgp_peer_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical tunnel name to router peer ID.
